message:
fix(test): fix u32::MAX→usize::MAX and remove nonexistent retry_after_ms field

- mission_security_abuse_review: agent_with_load params are usize, not u32
- RateLimited variant only has reason_code, no retry_after_ms field

Verified: subprocess-bridge test compilation clean (0 errors).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
